description: Source-grounded map storytelling framework for agent-maintained static map narratives

schemas.description: JSON schema for map story entries

examples.name: Mozart Journey
examples.description: A Chinese static map story about Mozart's travels, works, cities, sources, and personal collections

examples.name: Beethoven Journey
examples.description: A Chinese static map story about Beethoven's life from Bonn to Vienna, his signature and pre-deafness works, sources, and core life-stage collections

skills.name: Map Story Planner
skills.description: Plan the scope, audience, evidence rules, collection model, and static publishing target for a new map story
triggers: turn this topic into a map

skills.name: Source-Grounded Entry Writer
skills.description: Create or revise map story entries with conservative wording, citations, coordinates, and collection metadata

skills.name: Static Map Site Builder
skills.description: Build or adapt a no-backend static map site from a valid Agent-Mappy dataset
triggers: adapt Mozart Journey into a template
